summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of ChronoWeave timeline visualizer with Fantasy and Sci-Fi themes completed successfully. All major UI components, theme switching, event interactions, and timeline navigation features are working correctly.
passed_tests: Timeline loads correctly in Fantasy theme with 'One last job...' timeline data
Theme switch button successfully toggles between Fantasy and Sci-Fi modes
Event markers are clickable and open event card modal properly
Event card modal displays correctly and can be closed
Add Track form opens, can be filled out, and form validation works
Edit Track form opens when clicking on track label in sidebar
Timeline picker dropdown works and displays available timelines
Zoom controls work (zoom in, zoom out, reset) with visual feedback
Export JSON button is visible and clickable
Track axis click opens Add Event form with proper context
Theme consistency maintained across all UI elements
Accessibility features present (48 data-testid attributes, 33 buttons)
Fantasy theme displays with warm parchment colors and Cinzel/Cormorant fonts
Sci-Fi theme displays with dark space background and cyan/magenta glows with Orbitron/Exo fonts
All modals and forms properly styled for both themes
Event labels and markers display correctly with theme-appropriate styling
Timeline navigation and zoom functionality works without errors
